name: nlearn-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your NLearn/Moodle dashboard — fetch deadlines, assignment briefs, and calendar-ready events.
long_description: NLearn Sentinel scrapes your Moodle-based NLearn dashboard to surface upcoming deadlines, past assignments, PDF brief extraction, and Google Calendar-ready event data. Credentials are stored locally and never leave your machine.

nlearn_url.title: NLearn URL
nlearn_url.description: Base URL of your NLearn / Moodle instance (no trailing slash)

tools.name: get_upcoming_deadlines
tools.description: Get structured upcoming academic deadlines from NLearn

tools.name: get_past_deadlines
tools.description: Get structured past/missed deadlines from NLearn

tools.name: get_assignment
tools.description: Download and extract text from assignment brief PDFs

tools.name: get_deadlines_for_sync
tools.description: Get calendar-ready deadline events for Google Calendar sync

tools.name: refresh_session
tools.description: Clear cached session cookies and re-authenticate
